title: Course: COSC 486 - Applied Quantum Computing
description: Overview of quantum computing applications including quantum instruction sets, software development kits, and programming languages. Topics encompass cryptography, Shor's algorithm, quantum cryptography, optimization, and machine learning.
prerequisites_text: COSC 386 with grade C or higher
content:
COSC 486 - Applied Quantum Computing
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: COSC 386 with grade C or higher

Description: Overview of quantum computing applications including quantum instruction sets, software development kits, and programming languages. Topics encompass cryptography, Shor's algorithm, quantum cryptography, optimization, and machine learning.

Curriculum role:
  - BS Computer Science: Group C
  - BS Cloud Computing: Group C

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=57280
